demo.title: morv-quickstart.sh
demo.code:
npm install @morv-labs/morv
npx morv init
# .env: GROQ_API_KEY, MORV_API_KEY, BANKR_API_KEY, BANKR_AGENT_ADDRESS
npx morv agent create dca-bot --tools base-x402-discovery --daily 200 --per-tx 50
npx morv add base-x402-discovery
npx morv run "Aggregate DeFi TVL from x402 sources on Base"
npx morv guard status dca-bot

setup: Init: `npx morv init` (sign in at https://morv.run for `MORV_API_KEY`)
Set `BANKR_API_KEY` + `BANKR_AGENT_ADDRESS` and a BYOM key e.g. `GROQ_API_KEY`
Create agent: `npx morv agent create <id> --daily 200 --per-tx 50 --tools base-x402-discovery`
Run: `npx morv run "<prompt>"` then `npx morv guard status <id>`
